texto: The ability to form friendships to make people believe in you and trust you is one of the few absolutely fundamental qualities of success. Selling buying negotiating are so much smoother and easier when the parties enjoy each other's confidence. The young man who can make friends quickly will find that he will glide instead of stumble through life.
explicacao: Citação de John J. McGuirk sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “The ability to form friendships to make people believe in you and trust you is one of the few abs…” articula amizade, success, reflexao em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
